title: Cosmic Reach Plushies Port
description: A port of the plushies mod from the game cosmic reach!
body:
This mod is a complete port of the mod plushies from the game cosmic reach, it adds 6 decritive blocks for to use in your world!

**All Credit gose to Sirninjamonkey!**

![Credit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcd7c7611fcc98a05e9033a35856b456b68d41ef.png)
